  "findings": [
    "Cable tray fill ratio exceeds the maximum allowable limits specified by the National Electrical Code."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop further cable installation in the affected tray.",
    "Recalculate the allowable fill capacity based on cable types and sizes.",
    "Remove excess cables or install an additional, separate cable tray run to distribute the load."
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed field condition indicates that the cable tray fill ratio has been exceeded. Under NEC Article 392, exceeding the allowable fill limits can lead to excessive heat buildup, cable insulation degradation, and potential fire hazards, making the installation non-compliant and unsafe.",

    "NEC Section 392.22"
  ]
